scenarios.name: normal
scenarios.construction_rule: Published nominal active load and all listed components in service.

scenarios.name: renewable_shortfall
scenarios.construction_rule: Candidate PV availability is set to its exact lower bound zero; no weather multiplier is invented.

scenarios.name: demand_surge
scenarios.construction_rule: The full published nominal patch load is treated as simultaneously non-sheddable; no load multiplier or synthetic profile is added.

scenarios.name: pcc_loss
scenarios.construction_rule: Deterministic loss of the lexicographically first public patch-boundary/PCC supply indicator.

scenarios.name: local_generator_loss
scenarios.construction_rule: Published generator contingency when available; otherwise the patch's zero native generation is retained.

scenarios.name: forced_islanding
scenarios.construction_rule: All public boundary branches are unavailable, yielding a deterministic island.

scenarios.name: restoration
scenarios.construction_rule: The lexicographically first public N-1 boundary outage is returned to service in restoration mode.

scenarios.name: combined_high_stress
scenarios.construction_rule: PCC loss, candidate-PV lower-bound availability, and published generator N-1 are combined.

scenario_metadata.weighting: equal robust recourse blocks; not empirical probabilities
